\[
p _ {\theta} (X | \tau , \mathcal {B}) = \sum_ {Z \in \Sigma^ {M}} p _ {\theta} (X, Z | \tau , \mathcal {B}),
\]

1: Input: \(\phi, W\)  
2: \(\mathcal{G} \gets\) graph spanned by \(W\)  
3: \(\mathcal{G}_{\mathcal{I}} \gets \mathcal{G} \setminus \Lambda\)  
4: Initialize \(T_{1}\), e.g. by MST(\(W(\mathcal{G}_{\mathcal{I}})\))  
5: Initialize \(\tau \gets T_{1}\), \(s(\tau) \gets 1\), \(\mathcal{M} \gets \{\}\) and \(s \gets 1\)  
6: while \(|\mathcal{M}| < |V(\mathcal{G}_{\mathcal{I}})| - 1\) do  
7: \(\mathcal{R} \gets \mathcal{G}_{\mathcal{I}} \setminus T_{s}\)  
8: \(W_{1} \gets W(\mathcal{R})\)  
9: \(T_{s+1} \gets \mathrm{MST}(W_{1})\)  
10: pass \(T_{s}, T_{s+1}, \tau, W, \mathcal{M}\) to Algorithm 4  
11: \(\tau, \mathcal{M}\) updated in Alg. 4  
12: \(s(\tau) \gets s(\tau) \times r\), from return value \(r\) of Alg. 4  
13: \(T_{s} \gets T_{s+1}\), \(s \gets s + 1\)  
14: end while  
15: Sample leaf connections  
16: for \(u \in V(\Lambda)\) do  
17: \(i \gets\) indexes of internal vertices in \(\mathcal{G}\)  
18: \(p_{1}, \ldots, p_{n} \gets \frac{W(u,i_{1})}{\Sigma W(u,i)}, \ldots, \frac{W(u,i_{n})}{\Sigma W(u,i)}\)  
19: \(v \gets \text{Categorical}(p_{1}, \ldots, p_{n})\)  
20: add \((u,v)\) to \(\tau\)  
21: \(s(\tau) \gets s(\tau) \times p_{v}\)  
22: end for  
23: return \(\tau, s(\tau)\)

1: Input: \(t_0, t_1, \tau, W, \mathcal{M}\)  
2: Initialize \(r \gets 1\)  
3: \(I_1 \gets \text{sort}(t_1)\), e.g. by sorting \(W(t_1)\) in descending order and selecting the indices.  
4: for \(e \in t_0\) do  
5: if \(e \in \tau\) then  
6: Set \(\tau_0, \tau_1\) such that \(e = \text{cut}(\tau_0, \tau_1)\)  
7: for \(e_1 \in I_1\) do  
8: if \(e_1\) connects \(\tau_0, \tau_1\) then  
9: \(e^* \gets e_1\)  
10: break inner for loop  
11: end if  
12: end for  
13: \(r_e = \frac{W(e)}{W(e) + W(e^*)}\)  
14: else if \(e \notin \tau\) then  
15: add \(e\) to \(\tau\) creating new graph \(\tau^*\) with cycle \(\mathcal{C}\)  
16: \(c \gets \arg \min(W(\mathcal{C} \setminus \{\mathcal{M} \cup e^*\}))\)  
17: if \(c = \{\}\) then  
18: continue  
19: end if  
20: remove \(c\) from \(\tau^*\)  
21: \(r_e = \frac{W(e)}{W(e) + W(c)}\)  
22: end if  
23: \(u \gets \text{Uniform}(0, 1)\)  
24: if \(e \in \tau\) and \(r_e < u\) then  
25: \(\tau \gets \tau_0 \cup e^* \cup \tau_1\)  
26: else if \(e \in \tau\) and \(r_e \geq u\) then  
27: \(M \gets M \cup e\)  
28: \(r \gets r \times r_e\)  
29: else if \(e \notin \tau\) and \(r_e < u\) then  
30: continue  
31: else if \(e \notin \tau\) and \(r_e \geq u\) then  
32: \(\tau \gets \tau^*\)  
33: \(M \gets M \cup e\)  
34: \(r \gets r \times r_e\)  
35: end if  
36: if \(|\mathcal{M}| = |V(\mathcal{G}_I)| - 1\) then  
37: break for loop  
38: end if  
39: end for  
40: return \(\tau, \mathcal{M}, r\)

\[
p \sim \operatorname {B e t a} (p | M - \phi_ {i j} + 1, \phi_ {i j} + 1).
\]

p \left(Z _ {u} = i \mid Z _ {w} = j, \tau , \mathcal {B}\right) = \frac {1}{4} + \frac {3}{4} e ^ {- \frac {4}{3} \mathcal {B} _ {u w}} \quad \text {i f} \quad i = j
